\tzpentry{ID5780}{Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5780 introduces Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ U(d) \propto \frac{\mu^{2}}{d^{3}} \to \infty \quad \text{as } d\to 0, \]
